<p>Our mission at Duolingo is to develop the best education in the world and make it universally available. But we’ve got more left to do — and that’s where you come in!</p> <p>Duolingo is the world's most popular learning app. Beyond our core learning product, we also offer English proficiency testing with the Duolingo English Test, and are bringing new subjects into the Duolingo app, where people can develop their Math and Music skills.</p> <p>We are passionate about educating our users, making fact-based decisions, and finding innovative solutions to complex problems. We offer meaningful work, limitless learning opportunities, and collaboration with world-class minds. Come brighten your life and over half a billion more!</p> <hr> <h4><strong><img style="max-width: 100%;" src="https://careers.duolingo.com/274c0c8ca00d7c576894.svg" alt="icon-brain-16px" width="17" data-is360="0">&nbsp; </strong><strong>What you’ll do...</strong></h4> <ul> <li>Solve our most ambitious problems with the right tool for the task</li> <li>Collaborate cross-functionally to bring your ideas to life in the product</li> <li>Identify problems, prototype solutions, evaluate their return on investment, and then implement the best solution at scale to improve the lives of our millions of learners each day</li> <li>Share your findings both within Duolingo as well as to the broader research community</li> </ul> <p>&nbsp;</p> <h4><strong><img id="geom_inter_1726854542099_26_1" style="max-width: 100%;" src="https://careers.duolingo.com/464e534703b1d6feb15d.svg" alt="icon-check-16px" width="17" data-is360="0"> &nbsp;</strong><strong>What we’re looking for…</strong></h4> <ul> <li>You have an Ph.D. in computer science or related technical field (or expect to by August 2026)</li> <li>A portfolio of impactful work, in the form of (for example) publications, open-source projects, or AI internships</li> <li>Ability to relocate to Pittsburgh, PA or New York, NY</li> <li>A creative, interdisciplinary, and entrepreneurial approach to R&amp;D</li> <li>Strong debugging and critical thinking skills</li> <li>&nbsp;</li> </ul> <p><strong><img style="max-width: 100%;" src="https://careers.duolingo.com/fc9a45d264d811cc446e.svg" alt="icon-heart-16px" width="17" data-is360="0">&nbsp;Why you’ll love working here…</strong></p> <ul> <li>Language learning opportunities</li> <li>Catered in-house lunches and breakfast</li> <li>Company-wide Hackathon</li> <li>PTO and company holidays</li> <li>Frequent company-wide dinners, monthly celebrations, social clubs, and so much more!</li> </ul> <p>&nbsp;</p> <hr><div class="content-pay-transparency"><div class="pay-input"><div class="description"><p><strong>We post a multi-level salary range for all of our roles.</strong></p> <p><em>This is not inclusive of the rest of our awesome portfolio that includes equity compensation and world-class benefits. Our salary ranges are the same for all US locations. Your recruiter can share more details about the range for a specific level during the hiring process. </em><em>The actual salary within the range is determined by many factors including but not limited to, skills, experience, education, and internal equity.</em></p></div><div class="title">Salary Range: </div><div class="pay-range"><span>$131,800</span><span class="divider">&mdash;</span><span>$178,300 USD</span></div></div></div><div class="content-conclusion"><p class="Z7ph2">Take a peek at how we care for our employees' holistic well-being with our benefits<a class="Z7ph2" href="https://careers.duolingo.com/#benefits">&nbsp;here</a>.</p> <p class="Z7ph2">We will do everything we can within reason to make sure that your interview takes place in an environment that fairly and accurately assesses your skills. If you need assistance or accommodation, please contact&nbsp;<a class="Z7ph2" href="mailto:accommodations@duolingo.com" target="_blank" data-stringify-link="mailto:accommodations@duolingo.com" data-sk="tooltip_parent">accommodations@duolingo.com</a>.</p> <p class="Z7ph2">Duolingo is proud to be an Equal Employment Opportunity employer. We do not discriminate based upon race, religion, color, national origin, gender (including pregnancy, childbirth, or related medical conditions), sexual orientation, gender identity, gender expression, age, status as a protected veteran, status as an individual with a disability, or other applicable legally protected characteristics.</p> <p class="Z7ph2">By applying for this position your data will be processed as per the<a class="Z7ph2" href="https://docs.google.com/document/d/e/2PACX-1vTX9GKeRMOMA9Vtm0vfGibrYPYz8ysl0Dg8KSXgj_PxeT5ChsdnNZZWtpxu4t7xillTPGnngnKCjIbV/pub">&nbsp;Duolingo Applicant Privacy Notice</a>.</p> <p class="Z7ph2">Sign up for job alerts&nbsp;<a href="http://my.greenhouse.io/users/sign_in?job_board=duolingo">here</a>.</p></div>
